untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news event' and 'at least 2 bars of sustained deviation before entry' — neither can be expressed with allowed indicators. News event detection requires external data unavailable in the indicator set. The 2-bar confirmation requirement cannot be implemented without bar-indexing or lookback arrays (close[1], close[2]), which are prohibited. Used price_pos_20 as approximation for deviation from 20-period MA (where <0.025 ≈ -2.5σ and >0.975 ≈ +2.5σ), but this is a rough proxy.
translation_notes: Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect mean-reversion logic (long on overshoots below MA, short on overshoots above MA). Entry uses price_pos_20 to approximate extreme deviations from the 20-period moving average. Vol_ratio_20 approximates volume confirmation. Exit at sma_10 matches reversion target. Hold_days_max set to 10 per time stop specification. Critical limitations: news event cannot be detected; 2-bar confirmation logic cannot be implemented within constraint rules.
